name: Medivnyk (Traditional Honey Bread)
recipeIngredient: 8 large eggs; Separated, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the honey to boiling and allow it to cool.
2. Separate the eggs, reserving the whites.
3. Beat the room-temperature yolks with the butter until fluffy.
4. Add the cooled honey and beat until well blended.
5. Add the sugar and blend well.
6. Sift the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon together, then sift again.
7. Add this mixture to the honey mixture.
8. Add the orange zest, juice, coffee, and sour cream, stirring until no dry flour shows.
9. Whip the egg whites until stiff.
10. Fold in a little of the whites, mixing well.
11. Add the rest of the whites.
12. Stir in the chopped nuts, if using them.
13. Pour into buttered and floured loaf pans, tapping to even the batter.
14. Bake in a preheated 325°F oven for about an hour.
15. Do not open the oven door during the first 30 minutes of baking.
16. Cool on wire racks for 10 minutes, then turn out to finish cooling.
17. Wrap well in heavy-duty aluminum foil and store in the refrigerator.
